name: 3d-visual-pipeline
description: Controlled reference-to-image production pipeline for governed and validated three-dimensional visual assets.

interface.longDescription: Analyze references, compile a versioned Scene Specification, validate governed assets, route through explicit runtime capabilities, generate or edit an image, diagnose deviations, and deliver a regression-checked visual asset.
defaultPrompt: Use the 3D Visual Pipeline to turn my reference into a governed, style-consistent, validated image.
